description: Move CloudSystem to lib/threejs directory as part of the rendering layer
details: Refactor CloudSystem to follow the architecture by moving it to the rendering layer and implementing the facade pattern to hide Three.js complexity.

description: Implement facade pattern in CloudSystem to hide Three.js complexity
details: Create a clean interface that hides the Three.js implementation details and provides a simpler API for cloud management.

description: Improve error handling with graceful degradation in CloudSystem
details: Add better error handling to ensure the application continues to function even if cloud rendering fails.

description: Add proper resource disposal in cleanup method of CloudSystem
details: Ensure all Three.js resources (geometries, materials, textures) are properly disposed to prevent memory leaks.

description: Move building data fetching to a BuildingService in the service layer
details: Create a BuildingService to handle all building data fetching and management, following the service layer architecture.

description: Use state management for building data instead of component state
details: Implement a Zustand store for building data to provide a centralized state management solution.

description: Implement error boundaries for better error handling in BuildingMenu
details: Add React error boundaries to prevent the entire application from crashing when errors occur in the BuildingMenu component.

description: Separate presentation from data fetching logic in BuildingMenu
details: Refactor BuildingMenu to separate the UI rendering from data fetching and business logic.

description: Implement proper error handling with typed errors in UserService
details: Create typed error classes and implement proper error handling in UserService to provide more meaningful error messages.

description: Add comprehensive logging in UserService
details: Implement detailed logging throughout UserService to aid in debugging and monitoring.

description: Implement caching strategy for user data in UserService
details: Add a caching mechanism to reduce API calls and improve performance when fetching user data.

description: Add unit tests for service methods in UserService
details: Create comprehensive unit tests for all UserService methods to ensure reliability.

description: Move RoadCreator to lib/threejs directory as part of the rendering layer
details: Refactor RoadCreator to follow the architecture by moving it to the rendering layer and separating UI from Three.js logic.

description: Separate UI from road creation logic in RoadCreator
details: Split RoadCreator into a UI component and a Three.js implementation class to improve separation of concerns.

description: Use service layer for road data persistence in RoadCreator
details: Create a RoadService to handle road data persistence and retrieval, following the service layer architecture.

description: Implement proper error handling in RoadCreator
details: Add better error handling to ensure the application continues to function even if road creation fails.

description: Add performance optimizations in RoadCreator
details: Optimize road creation process to improve performance, especially for complex roads.

description: Move RoadManager to lib/threejs directory as part of the rendering layer
details: Refactor RoadManager to follow the architecture by moving it to the rendering layer.

description: Move data persistence to service layer in RoadManager
details: Create a RoadService to handle road data persistence and retrieval, following the service layer architecture.

description: Implement proper error handling in RoadManager
details: Add better error handling to ensure the application continues to function even if road management fails.

description: Add geometry sharing for better performance in RoadManager
details: Implement geometry sharing to reduce memory usage and improve performance when creating multiple road segments.

description: Improve resource management in cleanup method of RoadManager
details: Ensure all Three.js resources (geometries, materials, textures) are properly disposed to prevent memory leaks.

description: Move PolygonRenderer to lib/threejs directory as part of the rendering layer
details: Refactor PolygonRenderer to follow the architecture by moving it to the rendering layer.

description: Implement facade pattern to hide Three.js complexity in PolygonRenderer
details: Create a clean interface that hides the Three.js implementation details and provides a simpler API for polygon rendering.

description: Separate rendering logic from data management in PolygonRenderer
details: Refactor PolygonRenderer to separate the rendering logic from data management to improve separation of concerns.

description: Improve performance with object pooling and LOD in PolygonRenderer
details: Implement object pooling and level of detail (LOD) techniques to improve rendering performance, especially for large numbers of polygons.

description: Add better error handling with graceful degradation in PolygonRenderer
details: Implement robust error handling to ensure the application continues to function even if polygon rendering fails.

description: Move InteractionManager to lib/threejs directory as part of the rendering layer
details: Refactor InteractionManager to follow the architecture by moving it to the rendering layer.

description: Implement facade pattern to hide Three.js complexity in InteractionManager
details: Create a clean interface that hides the Three.js implementation details and provides a simpler API for interaction management.

description: Use event bus consistently for all interactions in InteractionManager
details: Refactor InteractionManager to use the event bus for all interaction events to improve consistency and decoupling.

description: Add throttling for better performance in InteractionManager
details: Implement throttling for mouse move events to improve performance, especially on lower-end devices.

description: Improve error handling in InteractionManager
details: Add better error handling to ensure the application continues to function even if interaction handling fails.

description: Move SimpleWater to lib/threejs directory as part of the rendering layer
details: Refactor SimpleWater to follow the architecture by moving it to the rendering layer.

description: Implement facade pattern to hide Three.js complexity in SimpleWater
details: Create a clean interface that hides the Three.js implementation details and provides a simpler API for water rendering.

description: Add performance optimizations for different quality levels in SimpleWater
details: Implement different quality levels for water rendering to improve performance on lower-end devices.

description: Improve resource management in cleanup method of SimpleWater
details: Ensure all Three.js resources (geometries, materials, textures) are properly disposed to prevent memory leaks.

description: Separate rendering concerns from component logic in PolygonViewer
details: Refactor PolygonViewer to separate the rendering logic from component logic to improve separation of concerns.

description: Move data fetching to service layer in PolygonViewer
details: Use the PolygonService for all data fetching operations in PolygonViewer to follow the service layer architecture.

description: Implement proper state management using Zustand in PolygonViewer
details: Refactor PolygonViewer to use Zustand for state management instead of component state.

description: Add error boundaries for better error handling in PolygonViewer
details: Add React error boundaries to prevent the entire application from crashing when errors occur in the PolygonViewer component.

description: Reduce component complexity by breaking into smaller components in PolygonViewer
details: Break down the PolygonViewer component into smaller, more focused components to improve maintainability and testability.
